== Notes for [[Item:Q105701|Q105701]] ==

Source 1: http://www.yazehra.com/fatimabint.htm

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Aqeel_ibn_Abi_Talib
--------------------
* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death):

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000003176791783

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
